changelog: Sports games rail: games whose primary broadcaster doesn't strict-match a channel in your playlist (e.g. NHL game where the API says broadcaster=CBC and your playlist's CBC has a slightly different name) are NO LONGER dropped from the league rail. The card paints with the API channel name; clicking opens the per-game picker which does its own broader EPG lookup and offers every actually-playable channel (minus blacklisted patterns).

Clarification: the CBC blacklist added in v1.44.56 only ever affected the per-game channel picker — it did NOT cause games to disappear from the rail. The strict primary-broadcaster match was a pre-existing behaviour that is now relaxed.
All v1.44.57 features (curated Moods & Themes pack v5, CBC picker blacklist, Sports back-nav fix) still in place.
